quote_of_day.text: I remember watching the stars wearing this. My dad took me to that place. How did I end up like this? I failed my younger self. I failed my parents.
quote_of_day.name: Anon

articles.title: Weather on the board today
articles.body:
A low-pressure system of insults and trolling moved over the board today, fueled by a video link shared by an anon. The opener 'FOUND THE VIDEO!' drew a heavy downpour of replies. crashing down on the thread.

A scattered front of caste-related tensions developed, with one anon boasting about trolling feminist Indians and another comparing the caste system to other societal structures. These threads brought a cold snap of hostility to the discussion.

Meanwhile, a heat wave of debate erupted when an anon claimed the RSS chief supported gay rights, sparking a fiery exchange. A separate thread questioning Dalit appearance brought a dark fog of controversy, with 19 anons weighing in.

The overall climate remained turbulent, with no clear clearing in sight.

articles.title: Anon Shares Video Link, Insults Follow
articles.body:
Anon kicked off the discussion by posting a brief message: 'FOUND THE VIDEO!' One anon responded with a link to a video on eporner.com, accompanied by a crude insult: 'He's a degenerate who likes having his ass eaten by gorimems.

Likes sucking trans cocks too.' This anon also quoted posts 7447 and 7448, but their context was not provided.

Another anon questioned the content of the video, asking 'Bro why the fuck is she fingering his belly button?' A third anon responded to an apparently related query from two days prior, providing an update on the clip.

The video or image being discussed seems to have been described as featuring a woman performing a sexual act on a man's belly button.

One participant expressed skepticism about the identity of a person in the content, asking 'That's supposed to be a gorimem?' The conversation included several instances of profanity and insults.

One anon referred to someone as 'Bhosdike budhiya hai', which appears to be an obscene phrase in Hindi. Another participant suggested that pornographic content should be posted in a different section, /kama/.

articles.title: Anon Claims RSS Chief Supports Gay Rights, Sparks Debate
articles.body:
Anon kicked off the discussion by stating that Mohan Bhagwat, the RSS chief, supports gay rights. The original post read: "Abey yaar hando ab kya krega tu mohan bhagwat rss chief tu gay supporter hai".

Anon responded with a claim that feminism won't work in Orthodox Jewish settlements in Israel, suggesting that Jewish communities don't follow the feminist principles they allegedly preach to others.

Another anon chimed in, stating that both left-wing and right-wing factions in India are controlled by Jews, and that the same applies to America.

The conversation took a turn with anon's assertion that India is under Jewish control, citing increased pro-Israel stance under Modi and Jewish ownership of businesses in India.

One respondent countered, asking how the OP's personal life would be affected by someone transitioning or coming out, suggesting Hinduism has historically been pro-LGBT.

Anon pushed back, claiming the world has been under Jewish control since World War 2, and that nothing can be done about it. Some respondents made comments about Jewish influence and control, while others made personal attacks.

The discussion also touched on the idea of a "Dalit republic" and criticisms of various political parties in India. Anon suggested India needs someone like Mao, implying a desire for radical change.

articles.title: Anon Questions Dalit Appearance
articles.body:
Anon opened a discussion on the physical appearance of Dalits, asking if anyone had seen a good-looking Dalit, excluding those with mixed ancestry or from Northwest India.

One respondent claimed that Northwest India, specifically Punjab, has a different genetic makeup compared to other regions, which affects the physical characteristics of its Dalit population.

Another user disagreed, stating that the genetic makeup of Punjabi Dalits is similar to that of Sikh Jats, and that inbreeding within the same caste is the reason for their distinct appearance.

The conversation took a derogatory turn, with multiple users making derogatory comments about Dalits, referring to them as "subhumans," "chamars," and "niggers." Some users claimed that Dalits are generally unattractive, with one stating that they have never seen a good-looking Dalit.

Others made baseless accusations about Dalits, including allegations of rape. The discussion also touched on the idea that some Dalits may "pass" as upper-caste individuals due to their physical appearance.

One user suggested that this might be because their mothers had been raped by upper-caste individuals. The conversation was marked by a lack of respect and civility, with users exchanging insults and pejoratives.

The thread did not present a cohesive or respectful discussion, instead devolving into a series of derogatory and accusatory comments about Dalits.

articles.title: Anon boasts about trolling feminist Indians
articles.body: Anon claimed to reply to feminist Indian women with an 'imwf' image to provoke them. Another anon warned that such replies could get one banned on Reddit. A respondent called the original poster 'pajeet', implying low social status. Anon also joked about someone getting doxxed. One participant labeled the thread 'Dalit thread'.

articles.title: Caste System Comparisons
articles.body:
Anon started a discussion by saying the caste system exists in every society, but India is more honest and vocal about it.

Another anon pointed out that social classes exist in the UK, citing Wikipedia articles on social class, and mentioned historical efforts to sterilize 'dysgenic white trash.' A respondent claimed the Indian caste system is 'credible and legit,' while others noted similarities in other systems, including the concept of 'cultural capital' in the West.
